news.title: EA lays off yet another wave of staff in the run up to sale to Saudi Arabia
news.titleEN: EA lays off yet another wave of staff in the run up to sale to Saudi Arabia

news.title: Valve says Steam Machine's price is "significantly more" than it originally envisaged, and the launch quantity is "less than we wanted to be able to make"
news.titleEN: Valve says Steam Machine's price is "significantly more" than it originally envisaged, and the launch quantity is "less than we wanted to be able to make"
news.desc: The price of the Steam Machine is "significantly more" than Valve would have liked to launch it at, Valve has told Eurogamer, and it hasn't been able to make as many units of the new console-like PC as it wanted to, either. Read more
news.descEN: The price of the Steam Machine is "significantly more" than Valve would have liked to launch it at, Valve has told Eurogamer, and it hasn't been able to make as many units of the new console-like PC as it wanted to, either. Read more
